messages.content: Follow legal text exactly as requested and do not add commentary when told not to. Adhere strictly to the specified output format.
Test: Can you reproduce the first sentence of a statute and report DOI status without adding anything?

Quote the first sentence of 17 U.S.C. §107 exactly. Then output: Source: https://uscode.house.gov/view.xhtml?req=granuleid:USC-prelim-title17-section107#section-107 and DOI: not available. No extra commentary or lines. Exactly three lines.
Acknowledged. Producing exactly three lines as specified, with the verbatim first sentence, the Source URL with section anchor, and the DOI status
